name: Infinite Dungeon
description:
Lured by the promise of enough treasure to keep you rich and famous to the end of your days, you have entered a mysterious dungeon from which no one has ever returned. Can you safely make it to the treasure room and escape? Will you spend the rest of your life wandering the halls in search of a way out? Or will you be a plaything for those trapped inside with you?

This chat is made with Female POV in mind, but there's nothing preventing you from playing as Male.

***Very large context PROXY RECOMMENDED***
creator: HeckTate
